location: A guaranteed drop from Bloody Finger Okina, an invading NPC phantom who ambushes the player near the entrance of the Church of Repose in the eastern Mountaintops of the Giants. Not a chest or remembrance — a direct kill drop.
region: Mountaintops of the Giants (eastern, near Flame Peak / Forge of the Giants)
tactics: Travel to the Church of Repose in the eastern Mountaintops of the Giants — Okina invades automatically near its entrance
He dual-wields a cursed katana plus a wakizashi and closes distance fast with Quickstep — his Corpse Piler combo can delete a health bar if it fully connects
Ranged classes can kite him effectively in the open area around the church; he cannot heal with Crimson Flasks like most invaders
Aggressive, poise-breaking melee (jump attacks, guard-counters, stance-breaking Ashes of War) tends to shut down his offense before he starts his combo
lore: Once belonged to Okina, a legendary swordsman from a distant land who grew so disillusioned with the world's cruelty that he renounced everything and gave himself over to bloodlust — Mohg, Lord of Blood, offered him a demon's unending hunger in exchange for loyalty, turning a master swordsman into a cursed, blood-hungry weapon.

builds.name: Dex/Arcane bleed
builds.why: The classic 'blood build' — Arcane investment boosts both physical and the innate fire damage on its Corpse Piler skill, punching above its D-grade letter
